liturgicalInfo.sundayTitle: Palm Sunday of the Passion of the Lord
liturgicalInfo.note: Daylight Saving ends Sunday 5 April — clocks go back one hour.

massChanges.heading: Holy Week Mass Schedule
massChanges.body: There are no ordinary weekday Masses this week. Please see the full Holy Week and Easter Triduum schedule below.

topNotices.heading: ✝ Holy Week 2026 Schedule
topNotices.body:
Palm Sunday — Saturday 28 March: 6:00pm Vigil Mass (St Monica's). Sunday 29 March: 9:30am Mass (St Martin's). Palms will be blessed at both Masses.

Holy Thursday (2 April) — Mass of the Lord's Supper: 7:00pm at St Martin's Church. Adoration at the Altar of Repose from the end of Mass until 9:30pm in St Martin's Church Hall.

Good Friday (3 April) — Stations of the Cross: 9:45am safely gathered at St Monica's School. Celebration of the Lord's Passion: 3:00pm at St Monica's Church.

Holy Saturday (4 April) — The Easter Vigil: 8:00pm at St Martin's Church.

Easter Sunday (5 April) — Mass of the Resurrection of the Lord: 9:30am at St Martin's Church.

topNotices.heading: Fr Roy Joins the Parish
topNotices.body: Fr Roy Elavumkal CMI will be installed as our new Parish Priest at the Easter Sunday Mass on 5 April. We warmly welcome him and look forward to this next chapter for our parish community.

topNotices.heading: Project Compassion — Final Collection
topNotices.body: This is the last week to return your Project Compassion boxes and envelopes. Please bring them to any Holy Week or Easter Mass, or drop them at the parish office by Good Friday, 3 April.

thisWeek.heading: Chrism Mass — Adelaide Cathedral
thisWeek.body: The Chrism Mass will be celebrated at St Francis Xavier's Cathedral on Monday 30 March at 6:00pm. All parishioners are welcome to attend this special diocesan liturgy where the sacred oils are blessed for the year.

thisWeek.heading: Stations of the Cross — Good Friday
thisWeek.body: 9:45am at St Monica's School. A prayerful devotion following the journey of Jesus to Calvary. This is in addition to the 3:00pm Passion Liturgy at St Monica's Church.

thisWeek.heading: Church Decoration — Holy Saturday
thisWeek.body: Volunteers are needed on Saturday 4 April to help prepare the churches for Easter. Please bring flowers if you are able. Contact the parish office to help.

thisWeek.heading: Easter Collection
thisWeek.body: The Easter collection is a personal gift to the priests of the parish. Envelopes are available at the doors of both churches.

communitySchool.heading: Parish Office — Easter Closure
communitySchool.body: The parish office will be closed from Thursday 2 April through to Tuesday 7 April inclusive. For urgent pastoral matters during this time, please phone (08) 8261 6200 and leave a message.

communitySchool.heading: St Martin's School News
communitySchool.body: St Martin's Catholic Primary School wishes all families a blessed and safe Easter. Term 2 begins Monday 28 April. Enrolment enquiries for 2027 are welcome — contact (08) 8211 2400.

communitySchool.heading: Good Giving Online
communitySchool.body: Support the parish through online giving via Good Giving. Set up a regular contribution at goodgiving.com.au/home/myparish or contact the office for details.

saturday.label: Saturday 28 March — Palm Sunday Vigil 6:00pm (St Monica's)
